en.title: 3D Maze Quest
en.description: A browser-based first/third-person 3D maze game where players navigate procedurally generated mazes across multiple biomes to reach the exit as quickly as possible.

en.title: Basket News Today
en.description: A React single-page application for aggregating and displaying basketball news with infinite scroll, a rotating breaking news banner, and mobile-responsive design.

en.title: Basketball News Crawler
en.description: A Node.js CLI tool that aggregates basketball news from Twitter, Instagram, Threads, and sports websites using multi-source crawling with scheduled automation.

en.title: Svelte Tooltips
en.description: A lightweight tooltip component library for Svelte using the action directive pattern, with configurable placement, arrow display, and full CSS variable customization.

zh.title: 3D 迷宮探險
zh.description: 瀏覽器端第一/第三人稱 3D 迷宮遊戲，玩家在程序生成的多樣生態迷宮中導航，挑戰最快到達出口的紀錄。

zh.title: 籃球新聞今日
zh.description: 基於 React 的單頁應用，聚合並展示籃球新聞，支援無限捲動、輪播頭條橫幅與響應式設計。

zh.title: 籃球新聞爬蟲
zh.description: Node.js CLI 工具，從 Twitter、Instagram、Threads 及運動新聞網站多源聚合籃球新聞，支援排程自動化爬取。

zh.title: Svelte 提示框
zh.description: 輕量化 Svelte 提示框元件庫，採用 action directive 模式，支援位置配置、箭頭顯示與完整 CSS 變數自訂。
